Name: Bethesda Plugin Manager - Extended
Author: MK-HATERS
Description: Manages plugin load order for Bethesda Game Studios game engines. Extended with full Starfield blueprint/medium/overlay plugin support and latest MO2 compatibility.

ReleaseNotes: Full Starfield blueprint plugin support: auto force-enable/disable, zone enforcement, validation
Medium plugin (ESH) support with FD index space
Overlay plugin detection fixed for Starfield and Fallout 4
Rebuilt for latest MO2 uibase and cmake_common
